configFields.description: Optional node-selected model ID. Empty means inherit the AI Brain default model for AI Paths. The picker uses the Brain model catalog.
Node-level sampling temperature (0-2). When set, it overrides the AI Brain default for this node.
Node-level maximum output tokens. When set, it overrides the AI Brain default for this node.
Optional node-level system prompt. A non-empty value overrides the AI Brain default; empty inherits the AI Brain prompt.
When true, image URLs are included as vision inputs if connected. Provider execution still routes through AI Brain.
When true, node waits and emits result. When false, emits jobId/status immediately.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
Cache key scope. run = isolate each run, activation = isolate by trigger/entity context, session = reuse across session.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.
